sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْخَبَّازُ يُوقِدُ الْفُرْنَ فِي السَّاعَةِ الرَّابِعَةِ صَبَاحًا.
sentences.translation: Pekar je palio pećnicu u četiri sata ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: The baker used to light the oven at four in the morning.

sentences.translation: Mijesio je brašno i brzo oblikovao hljebove.
sentences.translationEn: He kneaded the flour and quickly shaped the loaves.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَ النَّاسُ إِلَى الْمَخْبَزِ مُبَكِّرًا لِيَشْتَرُوا الْخُبْزَ الطَّازَجَ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su rano dolazili u pekaru da kupe svježi hljeb.
sentences.translationEn: People came to the bakery early to buy fresh bread.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ رَائِحَةُ الْخُبْزِ تَمْلَأُ الشَّارِعَ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Miris hljeba ispunjavao je ulicu svako jutro.
sentences.translationEn: The smell of bread filled the street every morning.
